title: Custom eggless birthday cakes for Marsden Park and Schofields
summary:
Marsden Park and Schofields are full of families. Finding a custom cake that genuinely has no eggs — that's been the harder part.

Num Nums Bakery is at Riverstone Shopping Centre, 10 minutes from Box Hill. Every cake is 100% eggless. Not some cakes. Every cake, every time. Six sizes from a 6-inch (serves 6–8, starts at $39.99) up to a 16-inch for larger gatherings. 15 flavours including Mango and Rasmalai. Buttercream, fondant, or ganache. Photo references welcome.

Order by WhatsApp: +61 425 697 725. 48 hours minimum notice — which is what fresh baking actually takes. Free parking at the shopping centre.
keywords: eggless cake near me North West Sydney
